parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ logGroupName: '/ecs/data-hub-service', startTime: Math.floor((Date.now() - 600000) / 1000), endTime: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000), queryString: 'fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /Sending/ and @message like /qa-weekly@starlightmusic.com/ or @message like /customerReachOut/ and @message like /QATest/ | sort @timestamp desc | limit 5', limit: 5 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ logGroupName: '/ecs/starbridge-sms-service', startTime: Math.floor((Date.now() - 600000) / 1000), endTime: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000), queryString: 'fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /Message sent/ or @message like /send.*sms/i | sort @timestamp desc | limit 5', limit: 5 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ to: 'etyler@starlightmusic.com', subject: 'Weekly QA Test - Did you receive the Contact Us notification?', html: '

Weekly Contact Us E2E QA Test

Hi Evan,

Our weekly QA test submitted a Contact Us form on starlightmusic.com at ' + $json.timestamp + '.

Test details:

  • Name: QATest WeeklyCheck
  • Email: qa-weekly@starlightmusic.com
  • Phone: (555) 867-5309

Did you receive the system notification email ("Customer Reach Out")?

YES - I received itNO - Did not receive

This is an automated QA test. The test data will be cleaned up automatically.

' }) }}

nodes.name: Email Evan: Did You Get It?

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ to: 'etyler@starlightmusic.com', subject: 'REMINDER: Weekly QA Test - Did you receive the Contact Us notification?', html: '

Reminder: Weekly QA Test Confirmation Needed

Hi Evan, this is a follow-up. We still need your confirmation about the weekly Contact Us QA test.

Did you receive the "Customer Reach Out" email notification?

YESNO
' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1500, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a QA engineer diagnosing a failure in the weekly Contact Us form E2E test for starlightmusic.com.

ARCHITECTURE:
- Form on starlightmusic.com/contact-us submits to starlight-event-service /getInTouch endpoint
- Event service creates Event + Client in MongoDB, triggers email via data-hub-service (SendGrid) and SMS via starbridge-sms-service (Twilio)
- Email goes to admin users (including etyler@starlightmusic.com) as "Customer Reach Out" notification
- Test uses Cypress on LambdaTest with reCAPTCHA bypass header

FAILURE TYPE: ' + $json.failure_type + '
CONTEXT: ' + $json.failure_context + '
BUILD ID: ' + $json.build_id + '

Respond with ONLY valid JSON (no markdown):
{
  "root_cause": "brief description",
  "severity": "critical|high|medium|low",
  "affected_service": "service name",
  "diagnosis": "2-3 sentence explanation",
  "recommended_fix": "what to check/fix",
  "requires_immediate_attention": true/false
}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { project: { key: 'SPRO' }, issuetype: { name: 'Bug' }, summary: '[QA-Auto] Contact Us E2E: ' + $json.failure_type + ' - ' + $json.diagnosis.root_cause, priority: { name: $json.diagnosis.severity === 'critical' ? 'Highest' : $json.diagnosis.severity === 'high' ? 'High' : 'Medium' }, labels: ['qa-auto', 'contact-us-e2e', $json.failure_type], description: { type: 'doc', version: 1, content: [{ type: 'heading', attrs: { level: 3 }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Contact Us E2E Test Failure' }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Failure Type: ' + $json.failure_type + ' | Build: ' + $json.build_id + ' | Time: ' + $json.timestamp }] }, { type: 'heading', attrs: { level: 3 }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Diagnosis' }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: $json.diagnosis.diagnosis }] }, { type: 'heading', attrs: { level: 3 }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Affected Service' }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: $json.diagnosis.affected_service }] }, { type: 'heading', attrs: { level: 3 }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Recommended Fix' }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: $json.diagnosis.recommended_fix }] }] } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '🔴 Contact Us E2E FAILED' } }, { type: 'section', fields: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Failure:*
' + $json.failure_type }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Severity:*
' + $json.diagnosis.severity }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Service:*
' + $json.diagnosis.affected_service }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Build:*
' + $json.build_id }] }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Root Cause:* ' + $json.diagnosis.root_cause + '
*Diagnosis:* ' + $json.diagnosis.diagnosis + '
*Fix:* ' + $json.diagnosis.recommended_fix } }, { type: 'context', elements: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: $json.timestamp + ' | <@ramon> <@emmanuel>' }] }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '\u2705 Contact Us E2E PASSED' } }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: 'Weekly Contact Us form E2E test passed. Evan confirmed receipt of notification email.\n*Date:* ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] } }] }) }}

main.node: Email Evan: Did You Get It?
